title: The Stanley Cup Hockey's Greatest Prize
titleZh: 斯坦利杯：冰球界的最高荣誉

q.en: After whom is the Stanley Cup named?
q.zh: 斯坦利杯是以谁的名字命名的？

options.zh: 普雷斯顿的斯坦利勋爵

explain.en: The book says the Cup is named after Lord Stanley of Preston, who was Governor General of Canada and loved the sport after seeing a game in 1889.
explain.zh: 书中说奖杯以普雷斯顿的斯坦利勋爵命名，他在1889年观看一场比赛后爱上了冰球。

q.en: In what year was the original Stanley Cup made?
q.zh: 最初的斯坦利杯是在哪一年制成的？

explain.en: The book says the cup was made in 1892 and was first called the Dominion Hockey Challenge Cup.
explain.zh: 书中说奖杯于1892年制成，最初称为“自治领冰球挑战杯”。

q.en: Which six teams are called the 'Original Six'?
q.zh: 哪六支球队被称为“Original Six（原始六队）”？

options.en: The six NHL teams in 1947: Toronto, Montreal, Detroit, Chicago, New York, and Boston
options.zh: 1947年的六支NHL球队：多伦多、蒙特利尔、底特律、芝加哥、纽约和波士顿
最早赢得奖杯的六支球队
仅有的六支加拿大球队

explain.en: The book says in 1947 there were only six NHL teams (Toronto, Montreal, Detroit, Chicago, New York, Boston), called the 'Original Six' because more teams joined later.
explain.zh: 书中说1947年NHL只有六支球队（多伦多、蒙特利尔、底特律、芝加哥、纽约、波士顿），因后来才加入更多球队而被称为“原始六队”。

q.en: How many best-of-seven rounds must a team win to take the Stanley Cup?
q.zh: 一支球队必须赢得多少轮“七战四胜制”才能捧起斯坦利杯？

options.en: Four: quarterfinals, semifinals, conference finals, and the Cup finals
options.zh: 四轮：四分之一决赛、半决赛、分区决赛和总决赛

explain.en: The book lists four best-of-seven rounds: conference quarterfinals, semifinals, conference finals, and the Stanley Cup finals.
explain.zh: 书中列出四轮七战四胜制：分区四分之一决赛、半决赛、分区决赛和斯坦利杯总决赛。

q.en: In the 1928 finals, who replaced the injured goalie in the net?
q.zh: 在1928年的总决赛中，是谁顶替受伤的守门员上场守门的？

options.zh: 主教练莱斯特·帕特里克本人

explain.en: When goalie Lorne Chabot was injured, 44-year-old coach Lester Patrick put on goalie gear and played, saving 19 shots to help the Rangers win.
explain.zh: 当守门员洛恩·查博特受伤时，44岁的主教练莱斯特·帕特里克穿上守门装备上场，扑出19次射门帮助游骑兵队获胜。

q.en: In the glossary, what is a 'slap shot'?
q.zh: 在词汇表中，“slap shot（大力抽射）”指什么？

options.en: A swinging stroke used to hit the puck with a lot of force
options.zh: 一种大幅度挥杆、用力击打冰球的动作

explain.en: The glossary defines a slap shot as a swinging stroke in hockey used to hit the puck with a lot of force.
explain.zh: 词汇表将 slap shot 定义为冰球中用大幅度挥杆、以很大力量击打冰球的动作。

q.en: What does 'sudden death' mean in hockey playoffs?
q.zh: 在冰球季后赛中，“sudden death（突然死亡）”是什么意思？

options.en: An extra period where the first team to score wins
options.zh: 一段加时赛，先进球的一方即获胜

explain.en: The glossary defines sudden death as an extra period added as a tiebreaker where the first team to score wins.
explain.zh: 词汇表将 sudden death 定义为加在常规时间后的加时赛，先进球的一方即获胜。

q.en: What is the 'Legend of the Octopus' about?
q.zh: “章鱼传说”讲的是关于什么的故事？

options.en: Detroit fans throwing an octopus (8 legs for 8 needed wins) for good luck
options.zh: 底特律球迷扔出章鱼（8条腿对应所需的8场胜利）以求好运

options.en: A sea creature living in the arena
options.zh: 一只住在球馆里的海洋生物

explain.en: The book says in 1952 Detroit fans threw an octopus onto the ice—eight legs for the eight wins needed—and it became a good-luck tradition.
explain.zh: 书中说1952年底特律球迷把章鱼扔到冰面上——8条腿对应所需的8场胜利——并成为一种好运传统。

q.en: Why is Wayne Gretzky called 'The Great One' and the Oilers called a 'Dynasty'?
q.zh: 为什么韦恩·格雷茨基被称为“The Great One（伟大的一号）”，而油人队被称为“王朝”？

options.en: They won five Stanley Cups from 1983 to 1990 led by Gretzky
options.zh: 他们在1983至1990年间、由格雷茨基领衔赢得了五座斯坦利杯
他们拥有最年长的球员

explain.en: The book says the Edmonton Oilers, led by 'The Great One' Wayne Gretzky, won five Cups in those years and were given Dynasty status by the Hall of Fame.
explain.zh: 书中说埃德蒙顿油人队在“伟大的一号”韦恩·格雷茨基的带领下，那几年赢得五座奖杯，并被名人堂授予“王朝”地位。

q.en: What point does the book make about the Stanley Cup being unique among North American sports?
q.zh: 关于斯坦利杯在北美体育中的独特性，书中表达了什么观点？

options.en: The winning team keeps the same Cup (not a new one each year) and winners' names are carved on it
options.zh: 获胜球队保留同一座奖杯（并非每年新做一座），冠军名字被刻在上面

options.en: Only Canadians are allowed to play
options.zh: 只有加拿大人才能参赛

explain.en: The book notes hockey is the only major North American sport that does not make a new trophy each year; the team keeps the Cup and names are carved into its bands.
explain.zh: 书中指出，冰球是北美唯一不每年新做奖杯的重大运动；球队保留同一座奖杯，冠军名字被刻在它的环带上。

prompt.en: The book shares wacky stories of what teams did with the Cup (a dog ate from it, it was used as an engagement ring bearer, it was thrown into a pool). If you won the Stanley Cup, what respectful or fun tradition would you start, and why?
prompt.zh: 书中讲述了球队与斯坦利杯有关的搞笑故事（狗从杯中吃东西、被用作戒指代盘、被扔进泳池）。如果你赢得了斯坦利杯，你会开创什么既尊重又好玩的传统？为什么？

en: Think about the book's 'If Only the Cup Could Talk' section and how players celebrate with the trophy.
Consider how a tradition could honor the team, the fans, or the history of the Cup.
zh: 想想书中“假如奖杯会说话”一节，以及球员们如何与奖杯庆祝。
思考一种传统如何向球队、球迷或奖杯的历史致敬。
